CVE-2025-6966.title: NULL pointer dereference in TagSection.keys() in python-apt on AP ...
CVE-2025-6966.description: NULL pointer dereference in TagSection.keys() in python-apt on APT-based Linux systems allows a local attacker to cause a denial of service (process crash) via a crafted deb822 file with a malformed non-UTF-8 key.
